scope: Boss defeat presentation and gameplay feel improvements
assetPolicy: Generated raster assets are effect-only. No boss body, silhouette, or species-specific form is included so the same assets can be reused across all bosses.

newRasterAssets.name: boss_death_explosion_a14
newRasterAssets.usage: Primary standard/zero boss finish explosion layer

newRasterAssets.name: boss_death_shockwave_a14
newRasterAssets.usage: Expanding shockwave layer for all boss finishes

newRasterAssets.name: zero_boss_death_core_a14
newRasterAssets.usage: ZERO final finish core pulse layer

rejectedAssets.name: initial_boss_death_explosion_candidate
rejectedAssets.reason: Contained a boss-like body shape, so it was rejected to keep the effect reusable for every boss.
